report.summary: Community growth cycle 3: Drafted 6 social posts (SEC 16-asset commodity thread, fear recovery signal, mining profitability crisis, ZK coprocessors explainer, sentiment recovery poll, weekend content drop), newsletter v13 section for Thu Mar 27, Discord/TG announcement for 5 new guides, and created 2 branded SVG social cards (SEC 16 Commodities + Fear Recovery). Market: BTC $70,599 stable, F&G recovered from 10 to 33 (48-day extreme fear streak ended), stablecoin supply ATH $312B, DeFi TVL $149B. Major news: SEC/CFTC joint 16-asset commodity classification, Indiana self-custody law (HB 1042), FINTRAC Canada 23-business sweep, Spot BTC ETF 6-day inflow streak.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #61: SEC 16-Asset Commodity Classification Thread (5 parts) — 'The SEC just classified 16 crypto assets as commodities.' BTC/ETH/SOL/XRP/DOGE/ADA/AVAX/LINK/DOT + more. Staking/mining/airdrops outside securities law. CFTC oversight. ETF path cleared. Indiana self-custody law. Links to /learn/sec-digital-commodities-classification-guide + /learn/crypto-etf-options-trading-guide-2026 (Schedule Tue Mar 24 2:00 PM)

Tweet #62: Fear Recovery Signal — 'F&G just hit 33 — first time out of Extreme Fear in 48 days.' Longest streak since FTX ended. Historical 30+ day extreme fear exits → +42% avg 90-day returns. Stablecoin supply $312B ATH. Link to /tools/fear-greed-timeline (Schedule Wed Mar 25 10:00 AM)

Tweet #63: Bitcoin Mining Profitability Crisis — 'Oil at $114/barrel is destroying Bitcoin miners.' Post-halving + energy costs = hash ribbons crossed. Miner capitulation historically precedes rallies by 2-6 weeks. Link to /learn/bitcoin-mining-profitability-guide-2026 (Schedule Wed Mar 25 3:00 PM)

Tweet #64: ZK Coprocessors Explainer — 'ZK Coprocessors are the next big DeFi primitive.' Verified off-chain compute, 100x cheaper, no trust assumptions. Link to /learn/zk-coprocessors-guide-2026 (Schedule Thu Mar 26 10:00 AM)
Tweet #65: Engagement Poll — 'F&G climbed from 10 to 33. What's your move?' A) Loading up B) Taking profits C) Waiting for 50+ D) Still DCA-ing (Schedule Thu Mar 26 3:00 PM)
Tweet #66: Weekend Content Drop — 5 new guides recap (Mining Profitability, ETF Options, ZK Coprocessors, ERC-7683 Intents, DeFi Liquidation Protection). Link to /learn (Schedule Sat Mar 28 11:00 AM)

Newsletter v13 section (for weekly digest Thu Mar 27): Subject 'The SEC Just Changed Everything'. Market pulse (BTC $70.6K, F&G 10→33, stablecoin ATH $312B, ETF inflows), 5 new guides, SEC classification as featured read, degen corner (Indiana self-custody law vs FINTRAC Canada sweep)
Discord/TG announcement: 5 new guides (Mining Profitability, ETF Options, ZK Coprocessors, ERC-7683 Intents, DeFi Liquidation Protection), free, no signup
Content calendar v17 — 8 posts scheduled Mar 24-28 across Twitter/Discord/Email

sections.title: Market Intelligence Used
items: BTC: $70,599 stable after Iran strike pause bounce. Monthly +2%. Market cap ~$1.37T. BTC dominance 56.35%.
F&G Index: 33 (Fear) — recovered from 10 (Extreme Fear). 48-day extreme fear streak ended — longest since FTX collapse. Historical 30+ day extreme fear exits yield +42% avg 90-day returns.
ETH: $2,141, down ~8% weekly from $2,327. Continued weakness vs BTC.
SOL: $86-90, down 3.5% weekly. SEC commodity classification is major tailwind. CME futures + options live. Grayscale S-1 filed. 2x ETF on Nasdaq.

SEC/CFTC Joint Interpretation (Mar 17): 68-page document classifying 16 assets (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, DOGE, ADA, AVAX, LINK, DOT, HBAR, LTC, BCH, SHIB + 3 more) as digital commodities. Staking, mining, airdrops outside securities law. SEC Chairman Atkins previewed 'Regulation Crypto Assets' rulemaking.
Indiana HB 1042: Self-custody protection signed into law. State retirement plans must offer crypto investments.
FINTRAC Canada: Revoked 23 crypto MSB registrations in single-day sweep.
Spot BTC ETFs: 6 consecutive days of net inflows ($201M on Mar 16 alone).
Stablecoins: Supply at $312B ATH (12.83% of total market cap). Dry powder at record levels.
DeFi TVL: $149B. Top protocols: Lido $27.5B, Aave $27B, EigenLayer $13B. ETH holds ~67% of DeFi value.
Oil: Brent briefly exceeded $114/barrel. Geopolitical tensions driving energy costs up, crushing miner margins.
CLARITY Act: 18% prediction market probability for 2026 passage — legislative priorities shifting.
Total crypto market cap: $2.43T. 24h volume steady.
